let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w0) and add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, k0) and not add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w0 + k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w0) and add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w1) and not add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w0 + w1) }
let w2: A satisfy { add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w0) and add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w2) and not add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, w0 + w2) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { not add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, x0) or not add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, x1) or add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, x0 + x1) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (add_submonoid_zero_constraint[T0](x0) and add_submonoid_closure_constraint[T0](x0)) = add_submonoid_constraint[T0](x0) }[A](add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s))

function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not AddSubmonoid.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: AddSubmonoid[T0]) { AddSubmonoid.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[AddSubmonoid[T0]](k0) } }[A](add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s))

goal: add_submonoid_preimage[A, B](f, s).contains(a) = add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s, a)
proof: function[T0: AddMonoid, T1: AddMonoid](x0: AddMonoidHom[T0, T1], x1: AddSubmonoid[T1]) { Option.some[AddSubmonoid[T0]](add_submonoid_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = AddSubmonoid.new[T0](add_submonoid_preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[A, B](f, s)

function[T0: AddMonoid](x0: AddSubmonoid[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[AddSubmonoid[T0]](x0) != AddSubmonoid.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[A](add_submonoid_preimage[A, B](f, s), add_submonoid_preimage_contains[A, B](f, s), a)
function[T0: AddMonoid, T2: AddMonoid](x0: AddSubmonoid[T0], x1: AddMonoidHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = add_submonoid_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[B, A](s, f, a)
